recommendations.title: Noelle
recommendations.overview: Kris Kringle's daughter, Noelle, sets off on a mission to find and bring back her brother, after he gets cold feet when it's his turn to take over as Santa.

recommendations.title: The Rewrite
recommendations.overview: An Oscar-winning writer in a slump leaves Hollywood to teach screenwriting at a college on the East Coast, where he falls for a single mom taking classes there.

recommendations.title: Danny Collins
recommendations.overview: An ageing hard-living 1970s rock star decides to change his life when he discovers a 40-year-old undelivered letter written to him by John Lennon.

recommendations.title: Did You Hear About the Morgans?
recommendations.overview: New Yorkers Paul and Meryl Morgan seem to have it all -- except that their marriage is crumbling around them. But their romantic woes are small compared to the trouble they find themselves in after witnessing a murder. To protect them from an assassi

recommendations.title: KPop Demon Hunters
recommendations.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

recommendations.title: Find Me Falling
recommendations.overview: After a failed comeback album, a rock star retreats to a cliffside home on Cyprus, only to find his new life complicated by visitors — and an old flame.

recommendations.title: Two Weeks Notice
recommendations.overview: Dedicated environmental lawyer Lucy Kelson goes to work for billionaire George Wade as part of a deal to preserve a community center. Indecisive and weak-willed George grows dependent on Lucy's guidance on everything from legal matters to clothing. E

recommendations.title: The Band Wagon
recommendations.overview: A Broadway artiste turns a faded film star's comeback vehicle into an artsy flop.

recommendations.title: Starstruck
recommendations.overview: Pop star Christopher Wilde has fame, fortune and a big-budget Hollywood movie awaiting him. But after meeting Jessica Olson, a down-to-earth girl from the Midwest, he is faced with following his heart or doing what's best for his career.

recommendations.title: The Shipping News
recommendations.overview: An emotionally-beaten man with his young daughter moves to his ancestral home in Newfoundland to reclaim his life.
